member.name: T:HookId
member.summary:
The ID of a hook.

This class represents the HookId protobuf message, which contains the hook's creating entity ID and an arbitrary 64-bit identifier.

Create a new HookId. the hook's creating entity ID the arbitrary 64-bit identifier

member.name: M:HookId.ToProtobuf
member.summary: Convert this HookId to a protobuf message.

member.name: M:HookId.FromProtobuf(Proto.HookId)
member.summary: Create a HookId from a protobuf message.
